title: Ksumme
compiled_truth: Ksumme is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-09-07 to 2001-11-09), Ksumme sent 10 and received 73 emails, totalling 83 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rpickel](people/rpickel-isda) (9), [Rmetcalfe](people/rmetcalfe-isda-eur) (6), [Board](people/board-isda) (5), [Ejelich](people/ejelich-isda) (5), [Apapesch](people/apapesch-isda) (5).
